productDisplayName: Levis Kids Boy's Caspian Black Kidswear
description: CompositionBlack shirt made of 100% cotton, with two pockets on either sides on the front, buttoned straps on the shoulder, brand mark printed on the back towards the right and branded buttons FittingRegular47 cmWash care    Machine wash separately in cold water, colour will bleed    Use mild detergent    Dry cleaning possible    Do not bleach    Avoid soaking    Remove promptly    Dry flat inside out in shade    Iron at medium setting only    Iron on reverse    Wash before wearingYour little boy will be all ready to look like a young man in this cream white shirt from Levi's kidswear. The two pockets with shoulder straps will make him look like a little hero among his friends. The soft fabric will keep him all cool and comfortable while he is busy playing around. Team it with denims and small sneakers for that fab look.
